name: wordpicker
description: 按住 Ctrl 悬停查词，一键收录到单词本的浏览器扩展。

scripts.test:e2e: npm run build:chrome && npx playwright test
scripts.test:e2e:headed: npm run build:chrome && npx playwright test --headed
scripts.build: npm run build:ts && node dist/scripts/build-cross-browser.js all
scripts.build:chrome: npm run build:ts && node dist/scripts/build-cross-browser.js chrome
scripts.build:safari: npm run build:ts && node dist/scripts/build-cross-browser.js safari
scripts.release: npm run build:dict && npm run pack

author: Trae GPT-5.4
